creator: lioux@uol.com.br
text:
Simple update of libparanoia from 1.3 to 1.4. This one will cleanly link
against lynx-ssl (some level of security). This might be used with the other
lynx ports to remove the FORBIDDEN tag. A simple patch file and a LIB_DEPEND
rule should suffice.

How-To-Repeat: 
n/a
